name: agentic-os
description: Self-improving agent memory system with 15 skills across 6 layers: Identity, Orchestration, Core, Quality, Evolution, Transfer. Bootstraps .agent-memory/ in any project, cross-project learning via ~/.claude-memory/global/.

global_memory_path.description: Path to global cross-project memory store

auto_heartbeat_on_start.description: Run heartbeat automatically on session start via SessionStart hook

auto_wrapup_on_stop.description: Run wrap-up automatically on session end via Stop hook

pattern_push_threshold.description: Minimum confidence score to push patterns to global memory

pattern_pull_threshold.description: Minimum confidence score to pull patterns from global memory

max_iterations_log_entries.description: Maximum iteration log entries before oldest are archived

max_error_log_entries.description: Maximum error entries in errors.json before oldest are archived

max_review_entries.description: Maximum code review entries before oldest are archived

max_test_result_entries.description: Maximum test result entries before oldest are archived

agent_model.description: Model to use for background agents (context-detective, memory-keeper)

language.description: Language for skill output and communication
